title: KATHMANDU COUNTRYSIDE HIKE
highlights: Short and easy trekking near Kathmandu valley
Spectacular mountainous view
Insightful and architectural Namo Buddha monastery
Traditional life style of local people & culture
Buddhist norms, meditation and yoga activities
Mixture lifestyle of Aryan, Tibetan & Newari culture
description: Chisapani-Nagarkot-Dhulikhel-Namo Buddha- Kathmandu trek is one of the easier trekking trail in Nepal designed to explore nature and culture of Nepal’s countryside and the amazing mountain views. This trek is also known as Around Kathmandu Valley Trek. It is an excellent trek for those who wish to avoid a long, strenuous trek or have time only for a short and easy trek and fit for all age group and for all seasons.

itinerary.title: Drive to Sundarijal & trek to Chisapani (2160m)
itinerary.desc: Take a short drive from Kathmandu to Sundarijal and start our trekking to Chisapani where you will be enjoying the real beauty of nature with the Himalayan view.

itinerary.title: Chisopani – Nagarkot (2175m)
itinerary.desc: Today we hike towards Nagarkot. It is the famous panoramic hillside from where we can get picturesque view of sunrise and sunset.

itinerary.title: Nagarkot – Dhulikhel (1550m)
itinerary.desc: Our journey continues to Dhulikhel from Nagarkot. Dhulikhel is the trade hub for the surrounding places and ancient Nepal- Tibet trade point where we can see the Newari and Nepali lifestyle.

itinerary.title: Dhulikhel – Namo Buddha (1810m)
itinerary.desc: The trail proceeds through unspoiled villages. Eventually, after 5/6 hrs treks bring you to a Tibetan Buddhist village Namobuddha with beautiful chorten and monastery.

itinerary.title: Namo Buddha – Panauti – Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Trek to legendary village Panauti and explore ancient temples. After lunch drive to historical heritage site Bhaktapur and then back to Kathmandu.

title: FAMILY HOLIDAY
highlights: UNESCO world heritage sites in Kathmandu
Chandragiri Hill Cable Car Tour
Trishuli River Rafting experience
Wildlife Safari in Chitwan National Park
4 days trekking to Ghorepani Poonhill
Lake city Pokhara exploration
description: This is an outstanding tour package to spend a quality holiday with your family around the Himalaya. The holiday with your family and kids in Nepal starts from the capital city of Kathmandu, traveling through scenic Pokhara, wild Chitwan, and completing with a beautiful trek to Poonhill.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Arrival at Tribhuvan International Airport, transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit Boudhanath Stupa, Swayambhunath, Bhaktapur Durbar Square, and Patan Durbar Square.

itinerary.title: Chandragiri Hill Cable Car Tour
itinerary.desc: Drive towards Thankot for a cable car tour with panoramic views of Kathmandu valley and Himalayan ranges.

itinerary.title: Trishuli Rafting - Drive to Chitwan
itinerary.desc: Fun filled rafting from Fishling to Kurintar, then drive towards Chitwan National Park.

itinerary.title: Chitwan Jungle Activities
itinerary.desc: Elephant ride, canoe ride, bird watching, elephant bathing, and village tour.

itinerary.title: Chitwan - Pokhara Drive
itinerary.desc: Short bird watching at Chitwan, drive to Pokhara, and boating tour at Fewa Lake.

itinerary.title: Drive to Naya Pul and trek to Ulleri
itinerary.desc: Start the trekking portion of the trip with an amazing view on the trail.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ulleri to Ghorepani
itinerary.desc: Walk through lush forests with exclusive mountain views of Annapurna South.

itinerary.title: Sunrise at Poon Hill & trek to Ghandruk
itinerary.desc: 45 minutes upward hike to Poon Hill for a mighty Himalayan sunrise view.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghandruk back to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Head back to Naya Pul through green forests and drive back to Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Sightseeing & fly to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Sunrise at Sarangkot, city tour (Davis Fall, Gupteswor Cave), and short flight back to Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to the airport for final departure.

title: LUMBINI TOUR
highlights: UNESCO world heritage site
Birth place of Gautam Buddha
Central attraction for Buddhist pilgrimage
Mayadevi temple from 3rd century
Ashoka pillar from 249 B.C
International Buddhist monasteries
description: Lumbini is one of the popular tourist destinations of Nepal. It is the birthplace of Gautam Buddha, famously known as the capital of Buddhism, situated in the Southern Terai at an altitude of 600 ft.

itinerary.title: Drive Kathmandu to Lumbini
itinerary.desc: Scenic 7-8 hours drive to Lumbini. Stroll around the local market in the evening.

itinerary.title: Explore Lumbini
itinerary.desc: Visit Lumbini Garden, Maya Devi Temple, Pushkarni Pool, and various international monasteries (Thai, Sri Lankan, Chinese, etc.).

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: 7-8 hours scenic drive back to Kathmandu with views of Himalayas, rivers, and jungles.

title: CHITWAN JUNGLE SAFARI
highlights: Elephant Safari and Jeep Drive
Canoe ride along the Rapti River
Tharu Cultural Program and Village Tour
Bird Watching and Elephant Breeding Center
Chance to see Rhino, Tiger, and Crocodile
description: Chitwan is one of the most adventurous and exciting places in Nepal. The major activities during the safari are focused on being part of the wild nature while staying in luxury accommodations.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Tharu Village Tour
itinerary.desc: Village tour, National Park Visitor's center, sunset view, and Tharu cultural dance.

itinerary.title: Canoe Ride & Elephant Safari
itinerary.desc: Morning canoe ride, bird watching, crocodile spotting, and afternoon elephant safari to see rhinos and other wildlife.

itinerary.title: Elephant Breeding Center & Departure
itinerary.desc: Visit the Government Elephant Breeding Centre before departure.

title: GORKHA-BANDIPUR-POKHARA TOUR
tagline: An Authentic Cultural & Scenic Himalayan Journey
highlights: Historic Gorkha Durbar (Palace)
Preserved Newari culture of Bandipur
Sarangkot Sunrise over Annapurna range
Boat ride on Phewa Lake
Siddha Cave exploration
Relaxed pace suitable for all ages
description: This tour is a perfect blend of history, culture, nature, and relaxation. It takes you through Nepal's mid-hill countryside, offering deep insight into traditional lifestyles and ancient heritage.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Transfer to hotel and trip briefing.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Explore Swayambhunath, Pashupatinath, Boudhanath, and Kathmandu Durbar Square.

itinerary.title: Drive to Gorkha
itinerary.desc: Scenic drive to the historical town of Gorkha.

itinerary.title: Explore Gorkha
itinerary.desc: Visit Gorkha Durbar, Gorakhnath Temple, and enjoy views of the Manaslu range.

itinerary.title: Drive to Bandipur
itinerary.desc: Travel to the charming hilltop settlement of Bandipur.

itinerary.title: Explore Bandipur
itinerary.desc: Visit Siddha Cave, walk through Newari streets, and enjoy Himalayan views.

itinerary.title: Bandipur to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Short scenic drive to Nepal's most scenic lake city.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit Davis Falls, Gupteshwor Cave, and International Mountain Museum.

itinerary.title: Sarangkot Sunrise
itinerary.desc: Early morning drive for sunrise over the Annapurna range.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day in Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Boating on Phewa Lake or optional adventure activities.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Return journey along the Prithvi Highway.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Shopping or rest.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport.

title: BADIMALIKA TOUR
highlights: Sacred Badimalika Temple (4214m)
Khaptad National Park exploration
Remote Far-Western Nepal immersion
Unique religious significance (Tribeni)
High-altitude grasslands and forests
description: A deep spiritual and natural journey to the remote Far-Western region of Nepal, exploring high-altitude temples and the biodiverse Khaptad National Park.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Dadeldhura
itinerary.desc: Flight to Nepalgunj, then Dhangadhi, and drive to the hills of Dadeldhura.

itinerary.title: Approach to the Temple
itinerary.desc: Drive to Jadanga, trek through Budha Krodh and rhododendron forests to Bhitachhina.

itinerary.title: Tribeni & Badimalika Temple
itinerary.desc: Religious bathe at Tribeni and climb to the sacred Badimalika temple at 4214m.

itinerary.title: Descent through Grasslands
itinerary.desc: Trek via Dhalpuri Pokhari, Bhansainkharka, and Laskechaur.

itinerary.title: Khaptad National Park
itinerary.desc: Explore Khaptad Danda, Baba's Ashram, and the unique flora and fauna of the park.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Trek to Silgadhi, fly back to Kathmandu, and departure.

title: JEEP TOUR TO RARA
highlights: Rara Lake (2990m) - Biggest lake in Nepal
4WD Off-road Jeep adventure
Exotic Karnali region exploration
Sinja Valley historical site
Stunning Alpine scenery
description: Rara Lake Tour is one of the best destinations for wild travelers. The 4WD Jeep tour is a fascinating adventure overland journey to the exotic and stunning natural beauty of the biggest lake in Nepal.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Surkhet
itinerary.desc: Long drive through rivers and Terai region to reach Surkhet.

itinerary.title: Surkhet to Kalikot
itinerary.desc: Drive through subtropical vegetation and green valleys to Kalikot.

itinerary.title: Kalikot to Rara Lake
itinerary.desc: Drive along the Karnali river, through Sinja Valley to reach Rara Lake.

itinerary.title: Excursion in Rara Lake
itinerary.desc: Boating in the blue water, hiking for best views, and visiting the National Park.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kalikot
itinerary.desc: Return journey through the rugged terrain.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Final long drive back to the capital.

title: KATHMANDU CITY TOUR
highlights: Pashupatinath Temple (Holy Hindu Site)
Boudhanath Stupa (Massive Buddhist Site)
Swayambhunath (Monkey Temple)
Patan Durbar Square (Art & Architecture)
UNESCO World Heritage Site exploration
description: Kathmandu is the capital city of Nepal with a glorious history of two thousand years. This tour shows you the medieval gems, golden era architecture, and rich Newar culture.

itinerary.title: Pashupatinath & Boudhanath
itinerary.desc: Visit the holiest Hindu temple on the Bagmati bank and the largest stupa in Nepal.

itinerary.title: Swayambhunath & Patan
itinerary.desc: Panoramic views from the hill-top temple and explore the artistic palaces of Patan Durbar Square.

title: Trek to Mount Everest
tagline: Sagarmatha National Park - A World Heritage Experience
highlights: UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1979
Home to the top of the world - Sagarmatha (8,848m)
Explore famed Sherpa culture and Tengboche monastery
Rich Flora: Pine, Hemlock, Juniper, and Rhododendron
Diverse Fauna: Snow Leopard, Red Panda, and Musk Deer
Views of Lhotse, Cho Oyu, and Amadablam
description: Sagarmatha (Mt. Everest) National Park, established in 1976, covers 1,148 sq. km of the Himalayan ecological zone in the Khumbu region of Nepal. Ranging from 2,845m at Monjo to 8,848m at the summit of Everest, the park features rugged terrain, deep gorges, and some of the world's highest peaks. The famed Sherpa people live here, their lives deeply interwoven with Buddhism, centered around historic monasteries like Tengboche, Thame, and Pangboche. The park is home to the red panda, snow leopard, musk deer, Himalayan tahr, and over 118 species of birds including the Impeyan pheasant.

subPackages.name: AMADABLAM BASE CAMP
subPackages.details: A stunning trek to the base of one of the world's most beautiful mountains. Experience Sherpa hospitality and iconic Himalayan vistas.

subPackages.name: EVERENT BASE CAMP AND KALA PATHHAR
subPackages.details: The classic journey to the foot of Everest. Reach Kala Patthar for the most famous view of the world's highest peak.

subPackages.name: EVEREST PIKEY PEAK
subPackages.details: A shorter trek offering one of the best panoramic views of Everest and the surrounding ranges from a lower altitude.

subPackages.name: EVEREST (3 HIGH PASSES)
subPackages.details: The ultimate Everest challenge. Crossing Kongma La, Cho La, and Renjo La for a complete Khumbu circuit.

subPackages.name: TREK TO PHAPLU EVEREST BASE CAMP
subPackages.details: A traditional approach to EBC, following the old trail used by early expeditions before the Lukla airport was built.

title: AMADABLAM BASE CAMP
highlights: Trek to the base of Ama Dablam, one of the world’s most beautiful mountains
Take in a panoramic view of Everest and surrounding peaks
Learn of Sherpa culture and visit traditional Sherpa villages
Explore the historic monastery of Tengboche
Follow in the footsteps of famous mountaineers
description:
Hiking the Ama Dablam Base Camp in Sagarmatha National Park is a classic trek through the Khumbu region. We hike to see Sherpa culture and the incredible views of Mount Everest, Ama Dablam, and many 8000-meter peaks. Ama Dablam, Pumori, and Nuptse tower above, making this a magical and inspiring place to visit. The journey includes visits to Buddhist monasteries at Pangboche and Tengboche, where you will learn about the Sherpa way of life and religion.

Stats:
- Trip Level: Moderate
- Max Altitude: 4570 m
- Season: March-May, Sept-Dec

itinerary.title: Arrive in Kathmandu (1,400m)
itinerary.desc: Transfer to your hotel and trip briefing.

itinerary.title: Explore Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Sightseeing of UNESCO world heritage sites.

itinerary.title: Fly to Lukla (2,840m), Trek to Phakding (2,610m)
itinerary.desc: 35 min flight and a gentle 3-4 hour trek.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche Bazaar (3,445m)
itinerary.desc: Uphill walk through pine forests and suspension bridges.

itinerary.title: Acclimatising walks around Namche Bazaar
itinerary.desc: Hike to Everest View Hotel for the first glimpse of Everest.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tengboche (3,860m)
itinerary.desc: Visit the famous Tengboche monastery with panoramic views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Pangboche (3,930m)
itinerary.desc: Afternoon explore the village and its ancient monastery.

itinerary.title: Day walk to Ama Dablam Base Camp (4,570m)
itinerary.desc: Reach the base of the world's most beautiful mountain.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kenjuma (3,550m)
itinerary.desc: Start the return journey with scenic views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Monjo (2,610m)
itinerary.desc: Descend back through Namche Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lukla (2,840m)
itinerary.desc: Final day of trekking.

itinerary.title: Fly to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Early morning flight and transfer to hotel.

title: EVERENT BASE CAMP AND KALA PATHHAR
highlights: Reach the base camp of the highest mountain in the world
Climb Kala Patthar (5,545m) for sunrise over the Himalayas
Cross high suspension bridges and explore hidden monasteries
Deep immersion in the warm, rugged Sherpa culture
Tranquil views of Mt. Thamserku, Ama Dablam, and Lhotse
description:
The Everest Base Camp Trek is a legendary challenge featuring 14 days of walking, high altitudes, and rocky tracks. From ancient Kathmandu, you'll ascend through the heart of the Khumbu region, crossing suspension bridges over thin air and visiting Buddhist monasteries. It's a journey into the soul of the mountains and the Sherpa people.

Stats:
- Trip Routes: Lukla - Namche - Tengboche - Pheriche - Lobuche - EBC - Kala Patthar
- Season: January to December

itinerary.title: Arrive Kathmandu (1,300m)
itinerary.desc: Welcome at the airport and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Fly to Lukla, Trek to Phakding (2,562m)
itinerary.desc: 35 min flight followed by a 3-4 hour trek along Dudh Koshi valley.

itinerary.title: Phakding to Namche Bazaar (3,440m)
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour trek through pine forests and Sagarmatha National Park checkpoint.

itinerary.title: Namche Bazaar: Acclimatization
itinerary.desc: Rest day with optional hike to Everest View Point.

itinerary.title: Namche to Tengboche (3,870m)
itinerary.desc: Breathtaking views of Everest, Nuptse, and Ama Dablam.

itinerary.title: Tengboche to Pheriche (4,312m)
itinerary.desc: Descend through woods, cross Imja Khola, and climb to Pheriche via Pangboche.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization in Pheriche
itinerary.desc: Important day of rest or optional side hikes.

itinerary.title: Pheriche to Lobuche (4,920m)
itinerary.desc: Trek beneath Cholatse and Tawoche peaks to the foot of Khumbu glacier.

itinerary.title: Lobuche to Gorak Shep (5,160m) and EBC (5,364m)
itinerary.desc: Reach the base camp of the world's tallest mountain.

itinerary.title: Kala Patthar (5,545m) to Pheriche (4,280m)
itinerary.desc: Sunrise views of the entire Himalayan chain from Kala Patthar.

itinerary.title: Pheriche to Namche Bazaar (3,440m)
itinerary.desc: Long descent back to the Sherpa capital.

itinerary.title: Namche Bazaar to Lukla (2,840m)
itinerary.desc: Descend to comfortable altitudes through farming villages.

itinerary.title: Fly back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Early morning flight and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to international airport for your flight home.

title: EVEREST PIKEY PEAK
highlights: Newly opened trekking destination with panoramic Himalayan scenery
Less crowded alternative to the main Everest region trails
Breathtaking views of Everest, Kanchenjunga, Makalu, and Lhotse
Trek through green pine and rhododendron forests
Visit holy monasteries, Mane walls, and the Holy Lake Dukunda
description:
Everest Pikey Peak Trek is a gem in the lower Khumbu region. It offers some of the best sunrise and sunset views in Nepal, including a massive range of snow peaks from Dhaulagiri in the west to Kanchenjunga in the east. It's a perfect mix of cultural influence and natural beauty.

Stats:
- Trip Routes: Dhap - Jhapre - Pikey Peak - Junbeshi - Phaplu
- Season: Spring and Autumn

itinerary.title: Arrive Kathmandu (1,300m)
itinerary.desc: Welcome at the airport and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Drive Kathmandu to Dhap (2,900m)
itinerary.desc: 8-9 hour drive through rhododendron forests.

itinerary.title: Trek Dhap to Jhapre (2,930m)
itinerary.desc: Easy 5 hour trek with views of Everest and Numbur Himal.

itinerary.title: Trek Jhapre to Pikey Peak Base Camp (3,600m)
itinerary.desc: Walk through rhododendron forests and yak pastures.

itinerary.title: Pikey Peak (4,065m) to Junbeshi (2,390m)
itinerary.desc: Summit Pikey Peak for 360-degree views, then descend to Junbesi.

itinerary.title: Trek Junbesi to Phaplu (2,380m)
itinerary.desc: Descend along Junbesi Khola, crossing suspension bridges.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: 9-10 hour jeep drive back to the capital.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport for your flight home.

title: EVEREST (3 HIGH PASSES)
highlights: Ultimate circuit crossing Renjo La, Cho La, and Kongma La
Climb three peaks: Gokyo Ri, Kalapathar, and Chukung
Explore four distinct valleys: Bhotekoshi, Gokyo, Khumbu, and Imja Tse
Hike to the legendary Everest Base Camp
Ideal for true adventure seekers and those physically fit
description:
The Three Passes Trek is the most complete and challenging trekking experience in the Everest region. It links high-altitude valleys and rugged passes, offering unforgettable views and a deep sense of achievement. This is purely for those seeking a tough, high-altitude adventure.

Stats:
- Max Altitude: 5545 m (Kala Patthar)
- Difficulty: Challenging
- Duration: 19 Days

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu (1,360m)
itinerary.desc: Transfer to hotel and trip briefing.

itinerary.title: Fly to Lukla, Trek to Phakding (2,652m)
itinerary.desc: Scenic flight and head up the Dudh Koshi Valley.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche Bazar (3,440m)
itinerary.desc: Cross high suspension bridges and climb to the Sherpa hub.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Day
itinerary.desc: Visit Khunde Hospital or hike to Everest View Hotel.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tengboche (3,860m)
itinerary.desc: Enjoy views of Everest and Ama Dablam through pine forests.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dingboche (4,360m)
itinerary.desc: Visit Pangboche Monastery and climb beneath Ama Dablam's north face.

itinerary.title: Trek to Chhukung (4,750m)
itinerary.desc: Trek through Imja Khola valley with views of Island Peak.

itinerary.title: Rest Day / Nagarjun Hill
itinerary.desc: Day trip for views of Lobuche and Ama Dablam peaks.

itinerary.title: Lobuche via Kongma La Pass (5,535m)
itinerary.desc: Cross the first high pass and the Khumbu Glacier.

itinerary.title: Everest Base Camp (5,364m)
itinerary.desc: Hike through moraine stones to reach the legendary EBC.

itinerary.title: Kala Patthar (5,545m) to Lobuche
itinerary.desc: Remarkable sunrise views over Everest.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dzongla (4,830m)
itinerary.desc: View Chola Lake spread below Mt Cholatse.

itinerary.title: Gokyo via Cho La Pass (5,368m)
itinerary.desc: Cross the second high pass with enchanting mountain views.

itinerary.title: Rest Day in Gokyo
itinerary.desc: Optional climb of Gokyo Ri for clear Everest views.

itinerary.title: Marlung via Renjo La (5,360m)
itinerary.desc: Cross the final high pass overlooking Gokyo lakes.

itinerary.title: Trek back to Namche Bazar
itinerary.desc: Pass through monasteries and descend to Namche.

itinerary.title: Trek back to Lukla
itinerary.desc: Final long descent along the Dudh Koshi River.

itinerary.title: Fly back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Scenic 45-minute return flight.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to international airport.

title: TREK TO PHAPLU EVEREST BASE CAMP
highlights: Traditional and less crowded route to Everest Base Camp
Sufficient time for acclimatization through Sherpa villages
Explore historic monasteries and rich Sherpa culture
Pass through lush valleys and rhododendron forests
Views of Everest, Lhotse, Ama Dablam, and more
description:
The Phaplu EBC trek is a fantastic alternative for those who want to avoid the flight to Lukla and experience the traditional approach. It offers a deeper look into the lower Khumbu region, passing through diverse vegetation and authentic villages before joining the main Everest trail.

Stats:
- Duration: 20 Days
- Season: October to May
- Activities: Trekking and Sightseeing

itinerary.title: Arrive Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Transfer to hotel and orientation.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu City Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit UNESCO heritage sites with a guide.

itinerary.title: Drive Kathmandu to Phaplu
itinerary.desc: Long 14-hour scenic drive to the hills.

itinerary.title: Rest day in Phaplu
itinerary.desc: Recover from the drive and prepare for the trek.

itinerary.title: Trek to Nuntala (2,230m)
itinerary.desc: Cross Takshindo-la pass with mountain views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Bupsa (2,730m)
itinerary.desc: Cross the Dudh Koshi River and climb through farming villages.

itinerary.title: Trek to Phakding (2,610m)
itinerary.desc: Follow the Dudh Koshi River trail north.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche Bazaar (3,440m)
itinerary.desc: Enter Sagarmatha National Park and climb to Namche.

itinerary.title: Rest day in Namche
itinerary.desc: Acclimatization hike to Khumjung village.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tengboche (3,860m)
itinerary.desc: Visit the largest monastery in Khumbu.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dingboche (4,410m)
itinerary.desc: Pass through rhododendron forests and cross Imja River.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization in Dingboche
itinerary.desc: Day hike to Chhukung valley for glacier views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lobuche (4,910m)
itinerary.desc: Climb towards the foot of the Khumbu Glacier.

itinerary.title: EBC (5,357m) and back to Gorak Shep
itinerary.desc: Explore the legendary Everest Base Camp.

itinerary.title: Kala Patthar (5,550m) to Dughla
itinerary.desc: Sunrise hike for the ultimate Everest view.

itinerary.title: Trek to Pangboche (3,930m)
itinerary.desc: Retrace steps downhill to Pheriche and Pangboche.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche Bazaar
itinerary.desc: Steep descent with constant mountain views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lukla
itinerary.desc: Final day of walking along the Dudh Koshi.

itinerary.title: Fly to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Return to the capital by air.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Final transfer to the international airport.
